refugeeAftermath.name: Refugee Aftermath
refugeeAftermath.label: Aftermath
refugeeAftermath.text: The earlier refugee ruling now has consequences across homes, roads, and ally courts.

choices.name: Settle Oaths
choices.text: Turn displaced families into housed workers and road crews.
choices.preview: Population and morale rise, and known factions remember the humane settlement.

choices.name: Frontier Families
choices.text: Sponsor willing families as frontier scouts and guides.
choices.preview: A scout joins near Olundar and living-faction relations improve.

choices.name: Ignore Petitions
choices.text: Save supplies now and leave petitions unanswered.
choices.preview: Morale falls and known factions record a grievance.

granaryAftermath.name: Granary Aftermath
granaryAftermath.label: Aftermath
granaryAftermath.text: The famine ruling echoes through markets, shrines, and hungry work camps.

choices.name: Open Festival Stores
choices.text: Stage a public ration festival before hunger turns political.
choices.preview: Morale rebounds and old famine resentment softens.

choices.name: Sign Grain Contract
choices.text: Bind merchants and allies to a stabilizing grain contract.
choices.preview: Known factions gain promise memory and modest relation.

choices.name: Order Hard Labor
choices.text: Use hunger as leverage for emergency timber and repairs.
choices.preview: Wood rises, but morale falls and grievances spread.

raidAftermath.name: Raid Aftermath
raidAftermath.label: Aftermath
raidAftermath.text: The raid warning leaves burned roads, frightened households, and a chance to seize initiative.

choices.name: Repair Streets
choices.text: Repair gates, roads, and watch posts before raiders return.
choices.preview: Olundar holdings gain durability and morale steadies.

choices.name: Hunt Raiders
choices.text: Fund a punitive patrol into the dark roads.
choices.preview: A cavalry patrol musters if space allows, and influence rises.

choices.name: Blame Outskirts
choices.text: Shift blame to frightened outer households to preserve stores.
choices.preview: Population and morale fall, and known factions record a grievance.

councilAftermath.name: Council Aftermath
councilAftermath.label: Aftermath
councilAftermath.text: The emergency council expects proof that Olundar will honor what it demanded.

choices.name: Publish Accords
choices.text: Publish clear promises to the living front and fund envoys to carry them.
choices.preview: Known factions gain relations and promise memory.

choices.name: Drill Veterans
choices.text: Turn council urgency into disciplined battlefield practice.
choices.preview: A legionary musters near the capital and morale rises.

choices.name: Delay Commitments
choices.text: Keep every option open and refuse new promises.
choices.preview: Influence is preserved, but known factions record grievances.
